formats.fact: - F-n: `path:line` | anchor: `existing_symbol_or_text` | observation: exact current behavior
formats.decision: - D-n: selected: exact approach | because: cited constraint or precedent | rejected: nearest alternative and drawback
formats.change: - CH-n: `path` | anchor: `symbol` | status: existing|new | change: exact behavior and branches
formats.test: - T-n: given: exact input and state | expect: exact output, error, or side effect | command: `exact command`
formats.risk: - R-n P0|P1|P2: scenario and consequence | Resolution: CH-n/T-n or accepted P2 rationale
formats.attack: - A1..A6: repaired|dismissed|not-applicable | evidence: concrete plan change or cited reason
formats.blueprint_heading: ### Execution Blueprint: CH-n[, CH-n...] — concise purpose
